Part.Source:
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Lista de Duplicatas"
Header if &Context.EmpCod.IsEmpty() LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan &Phone = FilFonNum &Mail = FilEml &Website = FilSit &AddressLine1 = FilLogNro &AddressLine2 = FilBai &AddressLine3 = FilCidNom +', '+ FilCidUfeCod Print printTitle EndFor
End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Sub 'PrintFilters'
If not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty() &FilterCreRecPagValueDescription = &CreRecPag.EnumerationDescription() print printBlockFilterCreRecPag EndIf If not &CreCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCod EndIf If not &CrePedCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCrePedCod EndIf If not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliCod EndIf If not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliRaz EndIf
Do case case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'A' //Abertas &TxtAbertaFechada = 'ABERTAS' print printBlockFilterCreVlrSdo
case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'P' //Pagas &TxtAbertaFechada = 'PAGAS' print printBlockFilterCreVlrSdo
otherwise //Todas &TxtAbertaFechada = 'TODAS' EndCase
If not &CreSts.IsEmpty() &FilterCreStsValueDescription = &CreSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterCreSts EndIf If not &CreFrpPgtoTip.IsEmpty() &FilterCreFrpPgtoTipValueDescription = &CreFrpPgtoTip.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterCreTipDup EndIf If not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct EndIf If not &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Vencto.", "até") print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct_To EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro1 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreBloNro1.IsEmpty() &CreBloNro = &CreBloNro1 print printBlockFilterCreBloNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty() &CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod1 print printBlockFilterCreCbrCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom1 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod1 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup1 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro2 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreBloNro2.IsEmpty() &CreBloNro = &CreBloNro2 print printBlockFilterCreBloNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty() &CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod2 print printBlockFilterCreCbrCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom2 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod2 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup2 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro3 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreBloNro3.IsEmpty() &CreBloNro = &CreBloNro3 print printBlockFilterCreBloNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty() &CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod3 print printBlockFilterCreCbrCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom3 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod3 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup3 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles' print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles EndSub
Sub 'PrintData' &TotalSaldo.SetEmpty() For each order EmpCod FilCod (CreDtaVct) Where CreRecPag = &CreRecPag when not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty() Where CreCod = &CreCod when not &CreCod.IsEmpty() Where CrePedCod = &CrePedCod when not &CrePedCod.IsEmpty() Where CreCliCod = &CreCliCod when not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty() Where CreCliRaz like &CreCliRaz or CreNovCliRaz like &CreCliRaz or &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty() Where CreVlrSdo <= 0 when &Status_AbertoFechado = 'P' Where CreVlrSdo > 0 when &Status_AbertoFechado = 'A' Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA when &IsCancelado = false Where CreDupNro like &CreDupNro1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND (not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty()) Where CreBloNro like &CreBloNro1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' AND (not &CreBloNro1.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND (not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrNom like &CreCbrNom1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND (not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty()) Where CreVenCod = &CreVenCod1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' AND (not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup < &CreVlrDup1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 AND (not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 AND (not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup > &CreVlrDup1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 AND (not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty()) Where CreSerItmCod = &CreSerItmCod1 when &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND (not &CreSerItmCod1.IsEmpty()) Where CreDupNro like &CreDupNro2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND (not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty()) Where CreBloNro like &CreBloNro2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' AND (not &CreBloNro2.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND (not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrNom like &CreCbrNom2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND (not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty()) Where CreVenCod = &CreVenCod2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' AND (not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup < &CreVlrDup2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 AND (not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 1 AND (not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup > &CreVlrDup2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 2 AND (not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty()) Where CreSerItmCod = &CreSerItmCod2 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND (not &CreSerItmCod2.IsEmpty()) Where CreDupNro like &CreDupNro3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND (not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty()) Where CreBloNro like &CreBloNro3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' AND (not &CreBloNro3.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrCod = &CreCbrCod3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND (not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty()) Where CreCbrNom like &CreCbrNom3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND (not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty()) Where CreVenCod = &CreVenCod3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' AND (not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup < &CreVlrDup3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 AND (not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 1 AND (not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty()) Where CreVlrDup > &CreVlrDup3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 2 AND (not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty()) Where CreSerItmCod = &CreSerItmCod3 when &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 AND &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND (not &CreSerItmCod3.IsEmpty()) Where CreDtaVct >= &CreDtaVct when not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() Where CreDtaVct <= &CreDtaVct_To when not &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() Where EmpCod = ProcRetCompany.Udp() // // using DSWWDuplicatas(&CreRecPag, &CreCod, &CrePedCod, &CreCliCod, &CreCliRaz, &CreVlrSdo // , &CreSts, &CreFrpPgtoTip, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &DynamicFiltersOperator1, &CreDupNro1, &CreBloNro1 // , &CreCbrCod1, &CreCbrNom1, &CreVenCod1, &CreVlrDup1, &CreSerItmCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 // , &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &DynamicFiltersOperator2, &CreDupNro2, &CreBloNro2, &CreCbrCod2, &CreCbrNom2 // , &CreVenCod2, &CreVlrDup2, &CreSerItmCod2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &DynamicFiltersOperator3 // , &CreDupNro3, &CreBloNro3, &CreCbrCod3, &CreCbrNom3, &CreVenCod3, &CreVlrDup3 // , &CreSerItmCod3, &CreDtaVct, &CreDtaVct_To) if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup Do case case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'A' //Só Abertas if CreVlrSdo > 0 &TotalSaldo += CreVlrSdo print printBlockLines_data EndIf
case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'P' //Só Pagas if CreVlrSdo <= 0 print printBlockLines_data EndIf
otherwise //Todas &TotalSaldo += CreVlrSdo print printBlockLines_data EndCase
EndFor print Total EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
If &Session.Get(!"WWDuplicatasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"WWDuplicatasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"WWDuplicatasGridState")) Endif
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECOD" &CreCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREPEDCOD" &CrePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CreFrpPgtoTip" &CreFrpPgtoTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor
EndSub
